history.notes: Critic identified 3 BLOCKs, 5 FLAGs, 3 suggestions. Review at v4_critic_design_review.md

All BLOCKs resolved: BLOCK-1 (equilibrium Option A + sequential eval), BLOCK-2 (key rename to equil_popcode), BLOCK-3 (LR/RF baselines added). All 5 FLAGs addressed. Architect response at v4_architect_response.md
Shael approved design. Human sign-off received. Advancing to Phase 1 implementation.
Brief sent to Builder agent (agent:builder:telegram:group:-5243763228). Building snn_crypto_predictor_v4_autonomous.ipynb.
Notebook confirmed on disk: snn_crypto_predictor_v4_autonomous.ipynb — 78 cells, 141KB. State updated by Architect after Builder failed to update. Critic code review triggered.
Critic kicked off by Architect. Reviewing snn_crypto_predictor_v4_autonomous.ipynb against design spec v4_architect_design.md.
APPROVED. 20/20 checklist items pass. 2 flags (n_folds_magnitude documentation, dead network guard scope) — both non-blocking, documented in v4_critic_code_review.md.

Phase 2 architect design written — v4_phase2_architect_design.md. Key change: decoding_scheme='exponential' (sigmoid(exp(r_up)-exp(r_down))), combined notebook (v4_combined.ipynb), FLAG-1/2 fixes, cross-analysis Section 9.
Critic design review requested for v4_phase2_architect_design.md. Awaiting approval before Builder handoff.
snn_crypto_predictor_v4_combined.ipynb built. 111 cells. All 3 Critic additions + 2 FLAG fixes. 20/20 structural checks. Pending Critic phase 2 code review.

BLOCKED — 2 issues found. BLOCK-1: train_fold_v4() uses BCEWithLogitsLoss for exponential direction training (double sigmoid on prob output) + loss_type undefined (NameError). Fix: detect model.decoding_scheme, swap to nn.BCELoss() for exponential, delete loss_type. BLOCK-2: evaluate_model_v4() confidence extraction uses |prob| for exp mode (asymmetric — strong-DOWN gets 0.152, strong-UP gets 0.848). Fix: use |prob - 0.5| when decoding=='exponential'. Full fix code in: research/pipeline_builds/v4_critic_phase2_blocks.md

APPROVED. Both blocks resolved. BLOCK-1: BCELoss for exponential, loss_type removed. BLOCK-2: |prob-0.5| confidence in evaluate_model_v4 and epoch_confidences. All 3 mandated additions pass. FLAG-1/FLAG-2 fixes confirmed. Section 9 cross-analysis complete. Review at: research/pipeline_builds/v4_critic_phase2_code_review.md
